\tzpentry{ID4893}{Magnetic Flux Functional}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4893 introduces Magnetic Flux Functional as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[\hat{\Phi}_{\nu} = \int_{\ManifoldL} \psi_{\nu}^{\dagger} \gamma^{\mu} (1 - \gamma^5) \partial_{\mu} \psi_{\nu} \, dV \otimes \mathcal{N}_{\text{glob}}\]
